query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_topology_latest_nodes AS
SELECT
    n.id            AS node_id,
    n.topology_id,
    t.activity_map_id,
    n.object_type,
    n.object_id,
    n.ipaddr,
    n.display_name,
    n.role,
    n.is_external,
    n.weight,
    n.node_data,
    t.raw_id,
    t.polled_at
FROM snap_topology_node n
JOIN snap_topology t ON t.id = n.topology_id
WHERE t.polled_at = (SELECT MAX(polled_at) FROM snap_topology);

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_topology_latest_edges AS
SELECT
    e.id            AS edge_id,
    e.topology_id,
    t.activity_map_id,
    e.source_node_id,
    src.display_name AS source_display_name,
    src.ipaddr       AS source_ipaddr,
    e.target_node_id,
    tgt.display_name AS target_display_name,
    tgt.ipaddr       AS target_ipaddr,
    e.protocol,
    e.weight,
    e.bytes_in,
    e.bytes_out,
    e.edge_data,
    t.raw_id,
    t.polled_at
FROM snap_topology_edge e
JOIN snap_topology t      ON t.id = e.topology_id
LEFT JOIN snap_topology_node src ON src.id = e.source_node_id
LEFT JOIN snap_topology_node tgt ON tgt.id = e.target_node_id
WHERE t.polled_at = (SELECT MAX(polled_at) FROM snap_topology);

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_topology_nodes_by_snapshot AS
SELECT
    n.id            AS node_id,
    n.topology_id,
    t.activity_map_id,
    n.object_type,
    n.object_id,
    n.ipaddr,
    n.display_name,
    n.role,
    n.is_external,
    n.weight,
    n.node_data,
    t.raw_id,
    t.polled_at
FROM snap_topology_node n
JOIN snap_topology t ON t.id = n.topology_id;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_topology_edges_by_snapshot AS
SELECT
    e.id            AS edge_id,
    e.topology_id,
    t.activity_map_id,
    e.source_node_id,
    src.display_name AS source_display_name,
    src.ipaddr       AS source_ipaddr,
    e.target_node_id,
    tgt.display_name AS target_display_name,
    tgt.ipaddr       AS target_ipaddr,
    e.protocol,
    e.weight,
    e.bytes_in,
    e.bytes_out,
    e.edge_data,
    t.raw_id,
    t.polled_at
FROM snap_topology_edge e
JOIN snap_topology t      ON t.id = e.topology_id
LEFT JOIN snap_topology_node src ON src.id = e.source_node_id
LEFT JOIN snap_topology_node tgt ON tgt.id = e.target_node_id;
